summary: #64760 is the only live candidate and remains the canonical issue for the remaining skills prompt visibility optimization. The older issue refs and #47553 are closed historical evidence only. No close, label, merge, or fix action is safe here; implementation needs maintainer product direction before it can be scoped narrowly.
